creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
Created attachment 188994
This machine's kernel configuration file ("CANARY")

Issuing "ipfw pipe show" yields the following (in /var/log/messages):

I note that "ipfw queue show" does NOT yield a whine. :-)

This is running stable/11 on amd64:
FreeBSD g1-252.catwhisker.org 11.1-STABLE FreeBSD 11.1-STABLE #485  r327021M/327021:1101506: Wed Dec 20 04:34:23 PST 2017     root@g1-252.catwhisker.org:/common/S1/obj/usr/src/sys/CANARY  amd64

(Though a quick reality-check running head @r327017 on the same system (different slice; same hardware & same ipfw ruleset) yielded a similar whine for "ipfw pipe show".)

Kernel modules loaded:

The kernel is based on GENERIC; has some devices I don't need on a laptop snipped out, and IPFIREWALL_DEFAULT_TO_ACCEPT is explicitly not enabled.  Current ipfw stuff:

This (REDZONE whine) is readily reproducible for me.

I will attach a copy of the kernel configuration file ("CANARY").
